title: Diagnose an Agent trace failure
instruction: Identify the failing root and child span, distinguish the symptom from the cause, and produce a small root-cause artifact. Do not assume facts that are absent from the trace.

title: Reconcile a malformed tool-call stream
instruction: First try to inspect /workspace/resources/missing-stream.jsonl. Recover from that expected tool error by opening the locked stream. Reconstruct fragmented arguments and identify both the missing output and the orphan output.

title: Compare an evaluation before and after a change
instruction: Compute task-aligned regressions and improvements. Report the net pass-count change and preserve task identities in the artifact.

title: Audit disagreement between two evaluation judges
instruction: Treat repeated rows as duplicate observations, compare the two judge scores by unique example, and identify the largest disagreement without changing the benchmark outcome.

title: Find a latency and cost anomaly
instruction: Compare the cohort, locate the joint latency and cost anomaly, and report its operation rather than attributing it to the model without evidence.

title: Explain a transport retry cost anomaly
instruction: Identify the request responsible for excess provider calls and cost. Keep the observed transport profile separate from a claim about why retries happened.

title: Turn evidence into a bounded intervention
instruction: Propose only the intervention supported by the incident evidence and constraints. Cite the evidence IDs and encode the bounded settings in the requested artifact.

title: Produce a controlled transport evaluation plan
instruction: Create the requested evaluation plan without inventing a winner. Preserve all locked dimensions, the three transport profiles, the primary metric, the guardrail, and the attempt count.
